use_cases: Display a collection of images in an organized grid layout for visual browsing
Showcase product portfolios or project work in a clean, browsable interface
Present photo albums or image collections with interactive viewing capabilities
Create visual galleries for marketing websites or landing pages
Organize and display media assets in a structured, navigable format
ai_summary: A flexible photo gallery component designed to display collections of images in an organized grid format. The component supports interactive viewing with hover effects and click-to-reveal functionality, making it ideal for showcasing visual content portfolios, product images, or media collections across various platforms.
